claims.statement: deleteFile calls requireAuthenticated before deleting a file.
deleteFile loads a VaultFileRecord by calling vaultFileRepository.findById(fileId).orElseThrow(...).
claims.source_quote:
VaultFileRecord record = vaultFileRepository.findById(fileId)
                .orElseThrow(() -> new IllegalArgumentException("The selected vault file no longer exists."));

claims.statement: deleteFile deletes the stored encrypted file using Files.deleteIfExists(appPaths.vaultDirectory().resolve(record.storedName())).
deleteFile removes the metadata record by calling vaultFileRepository.deleteById(fileId).
deleteFile logs FILE_DELETED with the original file name.

entities.name: deleteFile
entities.description: Method that deletes a vault file and its metadata.

entities.name: deleteById
entities.description: Method call used to delete a vault file record by id.

entities.name: deleteIfExists
entities.description: Method call used to delete a file if it exists.

entities.name: findById
entities.description: Method call used to retrieve a vault file record by id.

entities.name: log
entities.description: Method call used to write an audit log entry.

entities.name: now
entities.description: Method call used to obtain the current instant.

entities.name: orElseThrow
entities.description: Method call used to throw when an Optional is empty.

entities.name: originalName
entities.description: Method call used to access the original file name.

entities.name: requireAuthenticated
entities.description: Method that enforces that a session key is present.

entities.name: resolve
entities.description: Method call used to resolve a child path.

entities.name: storedName
entities.description: Method call used to access the stored file name.

entities.name: vaultDirectory
entities.description: Method call used to obtain the vault directory path.

relations.description: deleteFile calls findById to load file metadata.
deleteFile calls orElseThrow when the file record is missing.
deleteFile calls deleteIfExists to remove the encrypted file.
deleteFile calls vaultDirectory to locate the encrypted file.
deleteFile calls resolve to build the encrypted file path.
deleteFile calls storedName to obtain the stored file name.
deleteFile calls deleteById to remove metadata.
deleteFile calls log to record the deletion.
deleteFile calls originalName for the audit message.
deleteFile calls now to timestamp the deletion.
